channel.name: SoccerTruth
channel.niche: soccer / football facts and history — World Cup, GOAT debates, records, untold stories
channel.target_audience: Americans and English-speaking fans 18-50 passionate about soccer, especially during World Cup 2026
channel.tone: passionate, factual, storytelling — like a sports journalist who also loves statistics

script.format: trending — 20 min video for viral/trending content, not full 45min documentary
content_rules: Acknowledge that Pelé and Messi comparisons are subjective — present facts, let viewer decide
Never disrespect any player — objective, factual tone
Include era context: different rules, quality of opponents, tournament sizes
script.hook_style: start with the MOMENT the record was broken — visceral, you-are-there storytelling

thumbnail.style: split comparativo: jogador A esquerda (cor) + jogador B direita (P&B ou cor) + NÚMERO GIGANTE dourado no centro + pergunta em vermelho topo + glow dourado nos elementos principais

monetization.sponsor_niche: sports apps, streaming services, fantasy soccer
